---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ashutoshpatraa
---

## 🚀 Feature Request

### Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature solves.
e.g. "I find it frustrating when..."

### Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see.

### Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

### Implementation Notes

Any technical details, mockups, or references that would help.

### Would you like to work on this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting it
